code:
def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    
    # Calculate Bollinger Bands
    bb = ta.volatility.BollingerBands(df['close'], window=params['bb_window'], window_dev=params['bb_dev'])
    df['bb_upper'] = bb.bollinger_hband()
    df['bb_lower'] = bb.bollinger_lband()
    
    # Calculate RSI
    df['rsi'] = ta.momentum.RSIIndicator(df['close'], window=params['rsi_window']).rsi()
    
    # Generate signals
    signals = np.zeros(len(df))
    signals[(df['close'] > df['bb_upper']) & (df['rsi'] > params['rsi_upper'])] = -1
    signals[(df['close'] < df['bb_lower']) & (df['rsi'] < params['rsi_lower'])] = 1
    
    return pd.Series(signals, index=df.index).astype(int)
rationale: AUD/USD exhibits mean-reverting behavior when price touches Bollinger Bands extremes combined with RSI overbought/oversold conditions.
